prompt: A high-end photorealistic lifestyle shot of a long wooden outdoor dining table during a spring garden party. On the table are plates of grilled shashlik skewers, fresh spring salads, and appetizers. A hand holds a sleek modern smartphone, framing a photo of a plate; above the phone, a subtle holographic teal and lime green neon interface displays floating nutritional data (calories, proteins, fats). The lighting is a mix of warm golden hour sunlight and soft futuristic neon glows. Premium bokeh background with hints of green foliage. 8k resolution, cinematic lighting, vertical composition --ar 4:5
negative_prompt: text, logo, watermark, qr code, distorted hands, extra fingers, blurry face, messy table, low resolution, cartoon, illustration, dark moody lighting, red neon
notes: Combined the 'spring party/shashlik' theme with the 'photo-to-stats' tech feature.
Used a teal and lime green color palette for the UI to match the FoodFlow brand identity.
Focused on a 'premium lifestyle' aesthetic to ensure the cyberpunk elements feel like high-tech tools rather than a gritty dystopia.
Ensured vertical framing (4:5) for social media compatibility.
